schema_version.description: Schema version for this tool schema bundle, independent from MCP protocol version.

capabilities.description: Enabled providers/capabilities on this server, e.g. ['L0.assets','L1.reflection','L2.blueprints']

editor_only.description: If true, this tool/result is only valid in Editor and may degrade in cooked/shipping.

resource_uri.description: Opaque URI that can be fetched via MCP resources/read.

ObjectId.description: Stable object identifier. Provide at least one of soft_path/object_path/actor_guid.

Value.description: Typed value encoding. For complex types, prefer structured JSON and include type tags. (Discriminated union by `type`.)

type.description: Human-readable UE type string (e.g. float, TArray<int>, UObject*).

tags_query.description: Simple tag query: all keys must match exactly. Advanced query can be added later.

api_pattern.description: Substring/regex-like pattern for UE API usage markers.

datatable_asset.description: Full asset path of the DataTable, e.g. /Game/Data/DT_Weapons.DT_Weapons
Full asset path of the DataTable

row_names.description: Optional. If omitted, returns all rows.

datatable_asset.description: Full asset path of the DataTable

dataasset_asset.description: Full asset path of the DataAsset

asset_path.description: Single asset path or directory path (ending with /). Required.
Single asset path or directory path.

pattern.description: Text pattern to filter asset names.

convention.description: Override default prefix rules. Keys are class paths, values are expected prefixes.

world.description: World type (Editor, PIE, Game) or map name. Default: Editor.

rules.description: Array of rule objects to check.

min_z.description: Minimum Z coordinate (for no_underground_actors). Default: world KillZ.

assertions.description: Array of assertion objects to evaluate.
